description_long: This is a high-top hiking shoe featuring a light gray mesh and synthetic upper with reinforced overlays for durability and support. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue, with a black heel counter and outsole for added stability and traction. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with light gray laces threaded through fabric eyelets. The midsole appears cushioned for comfort, and the outsole is rugged with deep lugs for enhanced grip on various surfaces. Branding elements, including the Salomon logo, are visible on the tongue and heel, and subtle mint green accents highlight the pull tab and collar lining.
description: A rugged, light gray high-top hiking shoe with black and mint green accents, featuring a criss-cross lacing system and deep-lugged outsole for traction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Salomon branding, mesh upper, reinforced overlays, and the rugged black outsole.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the criss-cross lacing, padded tongue, and toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mesh and synthetic paneling, heel support, and outsole profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the Salomon logo on the heel, mint green pull tab, and padded collar.
attribute_logo: White 'Salomon' text logo on the tongue and a white 'S' logo on the black heel counter.
